name: Vibe Growth Corporation
summary: Vibe Growth Corporation engages in the cultivation, production, retail, and distribution of cannabis for recreation and medicinal use in the United States, Canada, and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Dispensaries, Cultivation, Real Estate, and Canada. It operates 5 dispensaries and a cannabis greenhouse cultivation, as well as sells its products online under the Vibe By California brand. The company was formerly known as Vibe Bioscience Ltd. and changed its name to Vibe Growth Corporation in October 2020. Vibe Growth Corporation is headquartered in Sacramento, California.
